/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & VERIFY JUVENILE/X:DEFENDANT TO HAVE A DENTAL EXAM TO DETERMINE WHETHER HE IS A JUVENILE,/X:IF DEFENDANT IS DETERMINED TOBE A JUVENILE, THE GUILTY PLEA WILL  BE SET ASIDE AND TRANSFER THE DEFENDANT TO JUVENILE COURT,/X:IF THE DEFENDANT IS DETERMINED NOT TO BE A JUVENILE, THE SENTENCING  WILL PROCEED ON 06-28-10/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST& CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:06-28-10/ARBUCKLE/X:BAIL REMAINS AT $35,000/CONTD:SENTENCING ON 06-28-10/DOP/CTORD:DR, JOE GOLDENSEN TO PERFORM A DENTAL EXAMINATION ON KEVIN  VELASQUEZ TO DETERMINE WHETHER KEVIN VELASQUEZ IS A JUVENILE AND THE DENTAL EXAMINATION  REPORT TO BE SUBMITTED TO DEPT, 10 ON OR BEFORE 06-17-10,/CONTD:STATUS OF DENTAL EXAM ON 06-17-10/DOP/
